function.name: code_interpreter
function.description: Execute Python code in a Jupyter notebook environment to analyze data, create visualizations with Plotly, compute metrics, and generate files.

function.name: airport_ops
function.description: Connect to the Airport Operations MCP server for real-time KPIs, flight data, delays, passenger stats, gate assignments, runway usage, turnaround metrics, and baggage handling performance at Hamad International Airport (DOH). Provides 40+ operational tools.

function.name: knowledge_base_retrieve
function.description: Search the test41miniweb knowledge base for relevant documents and information about Qatar Airways policies, procedures, baggage, refunds, loyalty programs, animal transport, check-in, visa/transit, and onboard services.

queries.description: Search queries to find relevant information in the knowledge base
